case_title: YONG FEI HUANG RESPONDENT VS. CARL AMME et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-05-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2005 - JUDGMENT AWARDED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT YONG FEI HUANG AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS/APPELLANTS CARL AMME AND YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, FOR DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1,952.14 AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $42.00, FOR A TOTAL AWARD OF $1,994.14. JUDGE: SHARON O'GRADY, JUDGE PRO TEM; CLERK: CRAIG BLACKSTONE; NOT REPORTED (D. 525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HUANG, YONG FEI RECOVER FROM APPELLANT AMME, CARL YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE $1,952.14 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,994.14, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause comes on for Small Claims Appeal trial de novo.
Appearances: Yong Fei Huang, Plaintiff/Respondent, in pro per; Carl Amme, Defendant/Appellant, in pro per.
The Clerk administers the oath to both parties, who present oral and documentary evidence to the Court.
The Court takes the matter under submission.
The Court awards judgment in favor of Plaintiff/Respondent Yong Fei Huang and against Defendant/Appellant in the principal sum of $1,952.14, plus costs in the sumn of $42.00, for a total award of $1,994.14.
Judge: Sharon O'Grady, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported (D. 525)
